Dor. They have published the fact
that union labor is refused recog-
milton at that stove factory; that
union men are refused employed.
Well, that is true.


That particular factory has
drawn the sword against union Ia
Dor. 1t has boycotted union labor
and union men. but If union labor
draws against this enemy its SINH
lar and only weapon-the boycott
the union officers who airect
this policy of fighting back are
sent to prison.


If Catholics advise each other to
patronize Catholics, is it a crime?
If Odd Fellows or Elks or Method
lists take concerted action to deal
with their friends and abstain from
dealing with their enemies, is it
crime worthy of felon's cell?
Yet Gompers, Mitchell and Morri-
son are to lose that sweetest thing
in life-liberty-and be branded as
criminals-because they have done
the work of their unions in advis-
ing union men to cease dealing
with the enemy of union labor.


Is this right? If conceded to be
right and principle recognized
in American life, will it stop with
its application to labor unions ?
Can people in general afford to be
Indifferent to law that makes out
laws of thousands of their fellow
citizens for doing things which is
inherently justifiable?


England ruled by the king, the
lords and the commons makes the
boycott legal by statute. In Eng
land Gompers, Morrison and Mitch
ell would be well within their
rights in doing what United
States court has sentenced them
to prison for.


Can we afford to be less lenient,
less liberal, less just than Britain ?
Can we afford so to treat great
masses of men that they will say,
IF this be justice, fie upon your
, law? No, this thing is crucial.
These are good men. They have
lone a thing not inherently Grim
nal. If they go to prison a time
Of storm and stress will be ushered
in, from which this nation will
emerge changed. The law that
imprisons labor leaders and falls
helpless in the effort to imprison
millionaire offenders cannot exist
with democratic institutions. Eth
er that law must go or the democ-
racy will.


And how far has the faith of our
liberty-loving fathers been dis
torted when the writer, for fear of
sacrificing his own liberty and his
employment, dare not sign his
own liberty and his employment
dare not sign his true name to his
honest opinions. but must sign


A Father of Six.
